action.reasoning: Observation: Baseline CLIP ViT-B/16 with 5 epochs achieved 0.1849 accuracy on Quickdraw. Val acc on source domains is 0.8112 and still improving. Each epoch takes ~1134s (~19 min). Analysis: The model is still learning. Key improvements: (1) train longer from checkpoint, (2) add sketch-specific augmentation (higher grayscale prob, random erasing), (3) slightly higher backbone LR. With 8.25h remaining, I can fit ~20 more epochs (~6.3h). Decision: Resume training for 20 more epochs with improved augmentation and slightly higher backbone LR.
